seoTitle: Jolimont vs Joondanna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jolimont and Joondanna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jolimont and Joondanna.
heading: Jolimont vs Joondanna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jolimont, Western Australia and Joondanna, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Joondanna has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Jolimont (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jolimont or Joondanna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jolimont has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Joondanna scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jolimont scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Joondanna scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jolimont or Joondanna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Joondanna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
